message: Once Hasaki calmed down and went to sleep, I quietly got up.
It's all right, Hasaki. I'm not a liar.
I will definitely come home.
Then we can talk as much as we want.
I will protect you.
Always.

name: Tomosane
message: "Now then..."
I still had a little bit of time left before dawn.

name: Tomosane
message: "Though, to be honest, I don't know how long it is till sunrise. It would be easier if it was just 4:30."
Dawn is approximately that time, but it's hard to tell when he's actually going to come back.
It would be really bad if he showed up while I was here with Hasaki.

name: Tomosane
message: "I need to find a deserted place so we don't drag anyone else into this."
I guess that means the rooftop.
When I left the rooftop last time, I didn't lock it, so it should still be open. That should work.
"Are you going?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... You're onto me, huh?"

name: Kimura
message: "Are you going to fight Mamiya Takuji?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Who knows?"

name: Kimura
message: "I think you do. Otherwise, there would be no reason to fight your Master."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't tell Hasaki."

name: Kimura
message: "You're keeping it a secret from Hasaki-chan?"

name: Tomosane
message: "There's no reason to tell her. I'm going to come home alive."

name: Kimura
message: "I see..."

name: Kimura
message: "Where are you going to do it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Does it really matter?"

name: Kimura
message: "I guess not... All right."

name: Tomosane
message: "Um, if something happens to me..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Look after Hasaki for me... Please."

name: Kimura
message: "Ahaha... You've never been polite to me before."

name: Tomosane
message: "There's a certain way to ask a favor of someone... And besides, I might've misunderstood you."

name: Tomosane
message: "It seems like you helped her out a lot while I was gone."

name: Kimura
message: "That might've just been convenient for me too, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then I'm glad that it was convenient for you to protect Hasaki. I have to thank you."

name: Kimura
message: "Oh? That's awfully nice of you. I'm not used to hearing that from you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, I really am thankful."

name: Tomosane
message: "So if anything happens to me, please continue to take care of her."

name: Kimura
message: "All right, but nothing's going to happen, right? You're going to win and end this whole mess."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes, and your investigation will probably end here too. I'm going to put it all to an end."

name: Kimura
message: "Really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I'll end it."
I returned to the school rooftop before sunrise.
The place where I'll spend the last of my remaining time.

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I have to fight so that this isn't the last..."
I wanted this time just so that I could say one thing to Hasaki.
To be honest, I don't know if I can keep my promise.
No, there's a pretty good chance I can't.
I did win against Master, but...
My fight with Mamiya Takuji will be on a different level altogether.

name: Tomosane
message: "Ayana..."

name: Ayana
message: "You came back to this place."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... The place doesn't really matter, though."

name: Ayana
message: "But you chose this place."

name: Tomosane
message: "I thought this was the most suitable place... So where is Mamiya Takuji?"

name: Ayana
message: "You still have a little bit of time left."

name: Tomosane
message: "Do you know what he's planning to do?"

name: Ayana
message: "He's trying to return it all to the sky."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right."

name: Ayana
message: "To the End Sky..."

name: Tomosane
message: "The End Sky... What is that?"

name: Ayana
message: "It's just a name. It doesn't speak of anything."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh... It's just a name?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes."

name: Tomosane
message: "Really? Then let me ask you a question. What are you?"

name: Ayana
message: "Me? I'm called Otonashi Ayana."

name: Tomosane
message: "But that's just a name, isn't it? That doesn't explain anything."

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe, then what are you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Me? I'm Yuuki Tomosane... And..."
I tried to say something...
But the words caught in my throat.
I tried to speak of myself, but I was lost for words.
Hahahaha... That's right.
That's just how it is.
In talking about oneself, it's impossible to say anything more than you could find on a person's resume.
The woman in front of me wore the same school uniform as I did.
I could tell from the color of the trim that she was in the same year as me.
She was female, and I was male.
For the two of us standing there and looking at each other, there was nothing else for either of us to say.
What are you? That's such a vague question... A meaningless question.

name: Tomosane
message: "I guess that's about right. I'm Yuuki Tomosane―nothing more and nothing less."

name: Ayana
message: "Okay. Then let me ask you a question."

name: Tomosane
message: "A question?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. A question I asked both Mamiya-kun and Minakami-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "What question?"

name: Ayana
message: "Tomosane-kun, are you afraid of dying?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Dying? Huh? That's a very straightforward question, isn't it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "But still... Several people have died in the past week or so. In this school alone, three people have died."

name: Tomosane
message: "A week that stinks like death. Many students have gone missing as well, and it's likely for the same reason."

name: Tomosane
message: "And the person who's behind it all is... Mamiya Takuji."

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun was afraid of Takashima-san's prophecy... And of his mother's prophecy."

name: Tomosane
message: "So it seems. I don't know much about Takashima's prophecy, but I know what his mother said. It was carved deep into his memory."

name: Tomosane
message: "The world will be destroyed. All existence will cease, and the world will be erased."

name: Tomosane
message: "What Mamiya Takuji was afraid of was his mother's prophecy... and by extension, death itself."

name: Ayana
message: "Fear of the prophecy is the same as fear of death, as well as fear of the prophesied erasure."

name: Ayana
message: "Are you afraid too?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hehehehe... Me? Before, I would've said this."

name: Ayana
message: "Said what?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm not really afraid of dying. I'm destined to disappear, after all."

name: Ayana
message: "Destined..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm just a personality created to destroy Mamiya Takuji... Or maybe I should say I was just a personality?"

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun, the Creator, Minakami-san, the Harmonizer, and then Tomosane-kun, the Destroyer."
This woman knows everything.
No wonder she always puts me on edge.
To think that she knows so much about us... It's almost like our souls are connected.
But she's different from us. She's not one of the personalities inhabiting this body.
Then what is she?
It's clear that she's not a normal person.
Which means she's another irregularity, but she's not quite the same as us...

name: Ayana
message: "What's wrong?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Nothing..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What you were just talking about, with the Creator, the Harmonizer, and the Destroyer... He was the one who put that system in place."

name: Tomosane
message: "But this is the end result. The Creator is trying to destroy the Destroyer."

name: Tomosane
message: "Mamiya Takuji couldn't accept his own fate of destruction."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, that's not quite right. There simply weren't enough actors on stage. You could even say that Mamiya Takuji released me from my role as the Destroyer."

name: Tomosane
message: "Which means that I've lost my fate."

name: Ayana
message: "What will you do now that you've lost your fate?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Now I should just wait to be destroyed and erased by the Creator. That's how Mamiya Takuji's new script reads."

name: Ayana
message: "Are you afraid of being erased?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course I'm afraid. I'm afraid of being erased, and I'm afraid of pain. Either way, it's terrifying. Death is a thing to be feared."

name: Ayana
message: "Then you don't want to die?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't want to die? I'm not sure... I don't know what that question is supposed to mean."

name: Ayana
message: "But you're afraid of death."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, of course. But somehow, all of the other things in this world which people fear doing, becoming, or happening are things that can actually be experienced, except death."

name: Ayana
message: "The doing, the becoming, and the happening..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Exactly. For instance, most people wouldn't want to be tortured... Maybe a real masochist would want it, though."

name: Tomosane
message: "Or else they don't want to go bankrupt. They don't want to become homeless."

name: Tomosane
message: "But those are things which are possible to experience, so it's possible to fear the doing, the becoming, and the happening of them."

name: Tomosane
message: "But there is no way to experience death."

name: Tomosane
message: "Death is all around us. Even the nearest graveyard is full of dead people. And yet there isn't a single person who has experienced death."

name: Tomosane
message: "Death is impossible to experience. That's the first principle."

name: Tomosane
message: "Taking something which is impossible to experience and speaking of it in the same breath as things which can be experienced strikes me as a perversion of logic."

name: Ayana
message: "We cannot speak of that which can't be experienced the same way as that which can."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right. But people speak of death as if it could be experienced. Why is that?"

name: Ayana
message: "Why?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't really know myself. Maybe death only has meaning because it's a perversion of logic."

name: Ayana
message: "Death only has meaning because it is a perversion..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... Isn't that what a perversion is?"

name: Tomosane
message: "At first, sex was just an act of biological reproduction. However, various perverted ideas throughout history have led people to think all things, create all things, and do all things of which they are capable."

name: Tomosane
message: "Sexual fetishes, for example. But not only that. Also, romantic love. Physical lust and romantic love are impossible to tease apart."

name: Tomosane
message: "So how did Mamiya Takuji respond when you asked him that question?"

name: Ayana
message: "He was angry. He wouldn't allow himself to admit that he was afraid of death."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see... What about Yuki?"

name: Ayana
message: "About the same as you. No one can experience death. It is impossible for a human being to experience death."

name: Ayana
message: "Let us reflect in another way, and we shall see that there is great reason to hope that death is a good; for one of two things, either death is a state of nothingness and utter unconsciousness, or, as men say, there is a change and migration of the soul from this world to another."

name: Tomosane
message: "Socrates, huh? Sounds like Yuki..."

name: Ayana
message: "And these were Socrates' last words."

name: Ayana
message: "The hour of departure has arrived."

name: Ayana
message: "And we go our separate ways, I to die, and you to live."

name: Ayana
message: "Which of these two is better only God knows."

name: Ayana
message: "Then holding the cup to his lips, quite readily and cheerfully he drank off the poison."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see... But I'm confused. These words from the great philosopher of ancient times... I wonder if his answer really was correct."

name: Tomosane
message: "Everyone knows that."

name: Ayana
message: "Everyone?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Socrates' words... To modern people, the meaning is almost too obvious."

name: Tomosane
message: "Even now, at this very moment, there are people dying."

name: Tomosane
message: "From the distant past until now, an unbelievably large number of people have died."

name: Tomosane
message: "Especially in this country, a great number of people have died without believing in any afterlife."

name: Tomosane
message: "People die every day with the understanding that death is not the road to another world, but rather simple oblivion."

name: Tomosane
message: "When you think about it, it's really bizarre. Death is the most terrifying thing within each of us, so we all think of it as the worst tragedy that could ever befall us."

name: Tomosane
message: "And yet people die every day. People die and it doesn't even matter."

name: Tomosane
message: "If death was such a frightful thing, there would be revolution every day as the people desperately tried to escape their deaths."

name: Tomosane
message: "But the truth is far from it. Most people don't thrash or cry in fear of their death. They simply die."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, it is true that many people experience regret when sentenced to death, but at the moment of death, they are perfectly calm."

name: Tomosane
message: "In other words, everyone knows that death isn't worth lamenting. It's perfectly obvious."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's a perverted impulse that even leads people to contemplate death."

name: Ayana
message: "Then you aren't afraid of dying?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I'm afraid. Of course I am, but I don't fear it any more than everyone else on this planet."

name: Ayana
message: "Everyone fears death?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... It's the same reason that a newborn infant cries, don't you think?"

name: Ayana
message: "The reason a newborn infant cries..."

name: Tomosane
message: "One who came before existence might loathe existence just as we loathe death."

name: Tomosane
message: "For instance, if a newborn infant cried to curse its own life..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I actually... had a dream like that several times."

name: Ayana
message: "A dream?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yes, a dream. It was a premonition."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm sure it was a premonition."

name: Ayana
message: "What kind of premonition?"

name: Tomosane
message: "A baby is born."

name: Ayana
message: "Whose?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't know."

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't know, but..."

name: Tomosane
message: "A baby is born."

name: Tomosane
message: "And that baby... cries."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wah, wah..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Everyone laughs as they hear the baby cry."

name: Tomosane
message: "They all bless the child."

name: Tomosane
message: "The mother..."

name: Tomosane
message: "The father..."

name: Tomosane
message: "And everyone else in the room."

name: Tomosane
message: "The child's life..."

name: Tomosane
message: "They bless it."

name: Tomosane
message: "The world is full with blessings for life."

name: Tomosane
message: "However..."

name: Tomosane
message: "However, that's wrong."

name: Tomosane
message: "And then..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I alone feel fear."

name: Tomosane
message: "Fear."

name: Tomosane
message: "Because..."

name: Tomosane
message: "The baby is cursing the world."

name: Tomosane
message: "Truly..."

name: Tomosane
message: "The newborn baby curses the world into which he is born."

name: Tomosane
message: "He curses the very fact that he was born."

name: Tomosane
message: "I freeze in that spot."

name: Tomosane
message: "As everyone laughs."

name: Tomosane
message: "In blessed ignorance."

name: Tomosane
message: "I alone..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I stumble..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I stumble and stagger, but somehow..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I come closer to that baby."

name: Tomosane
message: "And I try to stop its crying."

name: Tomosane
message: "And I know I have to do this."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't know why, but..."

name: Tomosane
message: "That baby, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "He was born."

name: Tomosane
message: "And I think about the cruelty in my life."

name: Tomosane
message: "And I think..."

name: Tomosane
message: "That this could be..."

name: Tomosane
message: "This could be my one way to atone for my sins."

name: Tomosane
message: "Sins against who?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Probably..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Against that baby..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Against something else, too..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I think..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I would strangle that newborn baby. I would try to end his life right there."

name: Tomosane
message: "I would end his life."

name: Tomosane
message: "As everyone else laughed."

name: Tomosane
message: "I would... I would put my hands around his neck."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't do it."

name: Tomosane
message: "With my hands around the neck of that crying baby..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't bring myself to throttle him."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why is that?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Even as I'm confronted with my one means of atonement, I can't do it."

name: Tomosane
message: "Though I know I must bring an end to his cries."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't do it."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't give that baby meaning to his life."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't give him any possibilities."

name: Tomosane
message: "I know it's the one thing I can do to atone, but..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't do it."

name: Tomosane
message: "I collapse on the spot."

name: Tomosane
message: "Right there..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I break into tears."

name: Tomosane
message: "I cry like a baby."

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm utterly pathetic."

name: Tomosane
message: "Even in a dream."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't do a thing."

name: Tomosane
message: "I cry and cry."

name: Tomosane
message: "A grown man."

name: Tomosane
message: "How pathetic."

name: Tomosane
message: "And as I do..."

name: Tomosane
message: "The crying of that baby..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It changes."

name: Tomosane
message: "It becomes... normal."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then..."

name: Tomosane
message: "The baby simply cries like any other."

name: Tomosane
message: "As I listen to its cries..."

name: Tomosane
message: "As I myself cry..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I think to myself, thank goodness..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Thank goodness..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I don't really know, but..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Thank goodness..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Nothing was really resolved."

name: Tomosane
message: "Nothing really changed."

name: Tomosane
message: "Just..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Just thank goodness."

name: Tomosane
message: "I cry."

name: Tomosane
message: "And I think..."

name: Tomosane
message: "The fact that I was born... The fact that I'm alive today is probably..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I think it's the same thing."

name: Tomosane
message: "And then I said..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I said this was a premonition."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's what I think."

name: Tomosane
message: "It's a premonition of my own life."

name: Tomosane
message: "The first question... You asked if I was afraid of death."

name: Tomosane
message: "Death is fearsome, but death will never come to any of us. That's the truth, and I understand it as such, yet I still find myself afraid."

name: Tomosane
message: "The fear of death germinates in a mind which thinks itself either blessed or cursed."

name: Tomosane
message: "Without that blessing, or that curse, man would not fear death, just as wild animals do not fear it."

name: Tomosane
message: "That blessing tortures man; that curse tortures man."

name: Tomosane
message: "At the same time, that blessing saves man; that curse too saves man."

name: Tomosane
message: "I guess that doesn't answer your question..."

name: Ayana
message: "No... That is a very good answer."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ayana... You called it the End Sky?"

name: Ayana
message: "End Sky."

name: Tomosane
message: "Can I see it too?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes."

name: Tomosane
message: "Will I really be able to see it?"

name: Ayana
message: "You will... but the last sky isn't yours."

name: Tomosane
message: "The last sky isn't mine?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yeah, he's coming back soon. I guess he's done ravishing me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ravishing you? Are you talking about Mamiya Takuji's delusions?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. Look..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"
A shadow?
No, that's not it. This is the same as before.
A shadow that wasn't there a moment before... That shadow gradually took shape before my eyes.
That shadow, standing between me and Ayana, took a human form.

name: Tomosane
message: "Mamiya Takuji..."

name: Takuji
message: "What... What did you just do to me?!"

name: Ayana
message: "I didn't do anything. I just watched."

name: Takuji
message: "You did something!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe, you just got caught up in your delusions. I didn't do anything."

name: Takuji
message: "What did you say?! There's no way that was a delusion! If I had such a realistic delusion like that, I wouldn't... I wouldn't even be able to tell the difference between reality and my delusions!"

name: Takuji
message: "That's right! I definitely felt the warmth of your skin! That couldn't have been an illusion!"

name: Ayana
message: "Warmth..."

name: Ayana
message: "How nasty."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What are you saying?!"

name: Takuji
message: "You're just some perverted futanari girl! You came everywhere!"

name: Ayana
message: "Like I said, I'm not a futanari."

name: Takuji
message: "No, I'll prove you're a futanari!"

name: Takuji
message: "See, I knew it."

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?!"

name: Takuji
message: "...It's not there?"

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun."

name: Takuji
message: "Agh... Blood?"

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun, that was over the line for a prank. You deserved to get punched for that. Hehehe, your nose is bleeding."

name: Takuji
message: "Ugh!"

name: Takuji
message: "Agh... Oww!"

name: Ayana
message: "If you want to pull a prank the next time you see me, you should be satisfied with just flicking my forehead."

name: Ayana
message: "Otherwise, I'll break your nose again."

name: Takuji
message: "Y-You..."

name: Ayana
message: "But... maybe there won't be a next time."

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe... I am Otonashi Ayana. That's what they call me. I am not your Riruru-chan's dregs, and I am not a shadow. I am not one of your delusions."

name: Takuji
message: "Riruru-chan isn't a delusion!"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, that isn't a delusion."

name: Ayana
message: "But that might be how it is. It refuses to recognize itself as a delusion, just like I do, and just like you do."

name: Ayana
message: "I'm not a delusion, and neither are you standing in front of me, but..."

name: Ayana
message: "I am Otonashi Ayana."

name: Ayana
message: "In this setting, I am human."

name: Ayana
message: "But you're not a human anymore."

name: Takuji
message: "O-Of course not. I'm the savior!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm going to save humanity. There's no way I could be a normal human!"

name: Takuji
message: "And I'm not the property of that pathetic soul called Mamiya Takuji!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm the person who will return the world to the sky! I am the savior! I am the one who controls the Holy Surge!"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, you will return it to the sky... That sky is called..."

name: Takuji
message: "The limit of the world. The final sky. End Sky."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. You will reach the End Sky."

name: Takuji
message: "The infinite and finite connect. The finite and the infinite connect. A spinning Ouroboros."

name: Takuji
message: "Circulation... eternal recurrence... continuity... eternity... circular motion... death and resurrection... destruction and creation... the base of the universe... the infinite... immortality... perfection... omniscience and omnipotence..."

name: Ayana
message: "Hmm... That sounds complicated."

name: Takuji
message: "The awakening of Jormungandr is at hand! It encircles Midgard. The great sea serpent grasping his own tail will awaken!"

name: Takuji
message: "It is at hand!"

name: Takuji
message: "Therefore, we must return to the sky!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehehe... That's nice."

name: Ayana
message: "You've found a reason for your existence."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Takuji
message: "It's not such a simple, vulgar concept as you think."

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe, of course."

name: Ayana
message: "Minakami Yuki..."

name: Ayana
message: "Yuuki Tomosane..."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What about them?!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehe."

name: Ayana
message: "Even now, you react to their names. They still bother you."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-Why would I care about them? There's no reason for me to."

name: Ayana
message: "Those two are living completely different lives than you are, saying completely different things than you are."

name: Ayana
message: "Each one sees different things, does different things, yet those things are the same."

name: Ayana
message: "The three are at the same time both disconnected and unified."

name: Ayana
message: "Creation, Harmony... and Destruction."

name: Ayana
message: "Their natures are completely different, but they're the same."

name: Ayana
message: "One who names it. One who speaks it. One who erases it."

name: Ayana
message: "Yuuki Tomosane-kun... He said..."

name: Takuji
message: "What did he say?"

name: Ayana
message: "A crying..."

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?"

name: Ayana
message: "A crying infant. He couldn't stop it from crying."

name: Ayana
message: "And the fact that he couldn't might be man's original sin, and because of that, its benevolence."

name: Ayana
message: "For a human to live is benevolence in the form of original sin."

name: Ayana
message: "The road to hell is paved with good intentions."

name: Ayana
message: "In that case, the road to hell is made of hope."

name: Takuji
message: "Hope..."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes, to live is to hope."

name: Ayana
message: "You don't need that anymore, since you're trying to do what Yuuki-kun was originally supposed to do."

name: Ayana
message: "The roles of the gods change. The Destroyer becomes the Creator. The Creator becomes the Harmonizer. Each of their roles change."

name: Ayana
message: "The Destroyer has lost his right to destroy, since the Creator is ending everything."

name: Ayana
message: "After rebirth, the god that was supposed to rule over harmony can't do anything. The Creator has given up on being the Rebirther."

name: Ayana
message: "The Creator is trying to destroy the world he created."

name: Ayana
message: "The Destroyer speaks of hope."

name: Ayana
message: "The Creator speaks of despair."

name: Ayana
message: "The Harmonizer hesitates and stops in place."

name: Ayana
message: "Stops and looks at where the world is going."

name: Ayana
message: "Now that the rotation has begun, it can't be stopped."

name: Ayana
message: "The final puzzle for man is the infinite and the finite, rotation and suspension."

name: Takuji
message: "Shut up! Shut up! I'm tired of listening to you!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm... I'm the person who will reach the End Sky!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'll say it again! I'm the person who will reach the End Sky!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'll say it again! I am the herald of the End Sky!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'll say it again! I hate you!"

name: Takuji
message: "I am the forerunner of prophecy, who will reach the complete world."

name: Ayana
message: "Today is already the 18th. There's just a little longer to go until the last sky."

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. The final sky. The last sky. The world's limit is approaching. Soon, soon I'll see the world's limit."

name: Takuji
message: "There's not much time until the 20th. No, I have to end it before then. I have to return everything to the sky. Everything."

name: Takuji
message: "I have to return all the people gathered in the ark."

name: Takuji
message: "The end is right there. The sky's limit is right there. The boundary line... The world's last... The End Sky is right there. That's it... Look."

name: Takuji
message: "Just look. It looks so big. It looks so massive."
What is that?
The sky looked... strange.
Is this what Mamiya Takuji was speaking of?

name: Takuji
message: "Beyond the limit... The limit is a door... Yes, a door. And beyond that door is a sea... An incredibly deep sea..."

name: Takuji
message: "Look, that is the world's limit... The final sky."

name: Ayana
message: "You're right."

name: Takuji
message: "The End Sky has already come this far... There are only a few more inches between us and the edge of the world."

name: Takuji
message: "Even now would be fine... I wouldn't mind jumping now."

name: Ayana
message: "Then why haven't you done it yet?"

name: Takuji
message: "I won't do it yet. I won't do it yet. I won't do it yet... Because I still have things to do here?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah!"
That's right. Something I still have to do. Something I have to do, and something Mamiya Takuji has to do.
That's right. This is the answer.
I took a deep breath and yelled out his name.

name: Tomosane
message: "Mamiya Takuji!"

name: Takuji
message: "Huh? That voice?!"

name: Takuji
message: "You... How long have you been there?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I've been here the whole time, much longer than you knew. Right here beside you. You haven't forgotten about me now that you've become the savior, have you?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yuuki Tomosane..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right. I'm Yuuki. The person you so feared... Yuuki Tomosane-sama."

name: Takuji
message: "Heh... What's with you? I haven't seen you in a while, but it seems like you've changed. I always thought you were just a dumb thug."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, things happen, you know? I've actually always been like this."

name: Takuji
message: "So what do you want from me?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You didn't finish me off. I'm sure you knew this was coming, right? I'm sure you could sense it."

name: Takuji
message: "Sense what?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Your fate. To be erased by me."

name: Takuji
message: "Ha!"

name: Takuji
message: "Is that what you came here to say? You're going to erase me? Some lowlife thug off the streets is going to erase me, the savior?"

name: Takuji
message: "Ahahaha... Don't you think you're a bit out of place here?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Out of place?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah. Exactly. You're the stupidest, lowest person I know. All you know how to do is talk with your fists, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, you're stupid, so maybe you don't know this, but talking with your fists means using violence."

name: Takuji
message: "In the furthest reaches of the universe, under the End Sky, why would I meet a vulgar man like you?"

name: Takuji
message: "The past times I've come here, I've met White Riruru, the Father Himself, Black Riruru's incarnation Otonashi Ayana, and other metaphysical existences beyond comprehension."

name: Takuji
message: "So then, why are you here?"

name: Takuji
message: "A physical being like you appearing here is so out of place. It's like if Mori no Ishimatsu suddenly appeared in Der Ring des Nibelungen and asked, 'Anyone want sushi?'"

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, really? Sorry about that, then. But didn't I say it before?"

name: Tomosane
message: "The battle between you and me will go on until one of us is destroyed. Did you think you could end it just by hurting me?"

name: Takuji
message: "More or less."

name: Tomosane
message: "Oh, really? You've underestimated me, then."

name: Takuji
message: "What are you talking about about? You can't talk after hiding away from me all this time."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hiding? Are you stupid?"
You're the one who tried to erase me.
But it's not worth explaining that to him.

name: Takuji
message: "I guess you were just waiting till the last moment, right? Were you off training somewhere?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right."

name: Takuji
message: "So you're planning to give me a performance worthy of the final act on the stage that is this world?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's it. These are the fruits of my labor."

name: Takuji
message: "Labor? What labor?"

name: Tomosane
message: "My labor... working to destroy you."

name: Takuji
message: "Working to destroy me?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah. The three principles that you don't understand. Work, courage, and fucking courage!"

name: Takuji
message: "You really have changed. Were you always such a run of the mill thug?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I've never been serious until now. I've always hidden my power. But this time, I'm serious. I've seriously come to kill you."

name: Takuji
message: "This might be a silly question, but why do you want to erase me so badly?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hehehehe... Why? That's a stupid question, Mamiya Takuji."

name: Takuji
message: "Stupid? Would I be wrong to say it's because you've been infected by the Black Surge?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Black Surge? I see you've come up with some new delusions. I don't remember you using that word the last time we met."

name: Takuji
message: "Come up with? Are you utterly thoughtless? I didn't come up with it. I learned it. I learned the truth."

name: Tomosane
message: "You believe every single one of your silly delusions, huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Delusions? Hehehe... It must all sound delusional to someone who hasn't even a fragment of knowledge."

name: Tomosane
message: "Delusion, huh? Just like Copernicus' heliocentric theory was called delusional, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "So you do understand."

name: Tomosane
message: "In ancient times, even though Philolaus believed that the Central Fire was at the center of the universe and the earth, the sun, and all other celestial objects rotated around it..."

name: Tomosane
message: "He believed the sky rotated around the earth. Do you know why?"

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "He already had his answer, and he changed reality to fit his notions. His worldview became warped."

name: Tomosane
message: "The center of the world is right here. That was a given. Even if it was mistaken, they couldn't accept that their world revolved around another celestial object."

name: Tomosane
message: "Preconceived notions... Reality forcibly fit to those notions... Doing that warped their worldviews."

name: Tomosane
message: "The facts that you want to be true coincidentally happen to align with reality. How often does that happen to you, Takuji?"

name: Tomosane
message: "But they still wanted to believe they were they the center of the world and everything revolved around them. They alone were special in the world."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, Takuji... You want to believe, do you? You can't accept the real world."

name: Tomosane
message: "You aren't the center of the world, and you aren't special! You aren't any sort of savior like your mother thought you were!"

name: Takuji
message: "Yuuki!"
He came right at me with a straight punch.
I saw exactly where his fist was headed.
His anger and reckless abandon showed me the path his fist would take.
Once I saw the attack, there was no problem.
I had only to hold strong in my heart.

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?!"
I dashed in, right next to his face.
My arm was already locked under his armpit.
Then I lowered my waist.
I lowered my waist and lifted him to nearly vertical in my hold.
And then...
His body went flying through the air.

name: Takuji
message: "Gh... Aagh."
A perfectly executed move.
Since his arms were stretched to their limits, I destroyed his joints while simultaneously slamming him down onto the concrete.

name: Takuji
message: "Ah... Is this dislocated?"

name: Tomosane
message: "How about that? The all-knowing savior should know about that move, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What was that? I've mastered every martial art on the planet. There's no move I don't know."

name: Tomosane
message: "You do know that move. You just forgot it is all."

name: Takuji
message: "Grr... Agh..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It looks like you're serious, huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Serious?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right."

name: Tomosane
message: "I thought I was born just to erase you. I denied myself and tried to erase myself."

name: Tomosane
message: "I thought I was created."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What are you..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I am the Destroyer. An existence born to end things. To destroy worlds with order. An existence that gives birth to new order."

name: Tomosane
message: "I was supposed to be a person created just for that purpose."

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you scared? Can't you admit it?"

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What are you talking about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What am I talking about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Are you stupid? I'm talking about Hasaki, of course!"

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What are you talking about?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... Even now... Even at the end, you can't hear it."

name: Tomosane
message: "Her name. That's it, isn't it? You tried to protect Hasaki by forgetting about her and pretending she was dead."

name: Tomosane
message: "For that at least, I have to commend you. No matter how crazy you got, you always put Hasaki's happiness first."

name: Takuji
message: "What's that? What are you saying?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Her name won't reach you until the very end, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Whenever the words you hear aren't convenient for you, you distort them or erase them."

name: Tomosane
message: "Especially when it comes to Hasaki. You've tried to erase or change all your memories of Hasaki."

name: Tomosane
message: "You've used every technique to erase, replace, or ignore Hasaki's existence. That's bravery. That was your own form of bravery."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What is it? You... Why haven't you been saying the most important parts?! Don't hide your words!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're the one who hid them!"

name: Tomosane
message: "It was you who hid them. But remember that I was the only one with a connection to Hasaki. Neither you nor Minakami Yuki, but I, the person who is fated to disappear!"

name: Takuji
message: "Are you crazy?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Crazy? Hehehehe... Are you really asking that? Here, in this place... No, in this world, there is not a single person who isn't crazy!"

name: Tomosane
message: "You should know it... The world you've birthed. The world you know. The world you created is filled with nothing but madmen!"
He couldn't even cushion his fall when I threw him. He only managed to twist his neck and disperse the force of the blow.
He's pretty tough, though.

name: Takuji
message: "Gah... Aah..."

name: Tomosane
message: "How about that? You can't even see straight now, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You haven't learned a single new trick. While you were playing around with your delusions, I was training so hard that I pissed blood in order to master some new techniques."

name: Tomosane
message: "This is the limit of your delusions."

name: Tomosane
message: "Your delusions... will be ended by my reality."

name: Takuji
message: "E-End..."

name: Tomosane
message: "This is the opposite of last time."

name: Tomosane
message: "Last time, I was there, leaning against the fence, and you looked down upon me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now it's the opposite. You're the one who's fallen bloody to the ground, Mamiya."

name: Takuji
message: "I've... fallen..."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's right. This is the end."

name: Tomosane
message: "Let's end it here, Mamiya Takuji."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "We're under the End Sky, so shouldn't it be fine?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Isn't it a fitting end for us?"

name: Takuji
message: "An end for us?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah. Let's end it here. We don't need to drag anyone else into this."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't drag everyone else into your games. The only ones who need to go along with your end of the world are me and her. The three of us are plenty."

name: Tomosane
message: "This sky is the end for just you and me."

name: Tomosane
message: "This is where it will end."

name: Tomosane
message: "Isn't that good enough, Takuji?"
I always carried this knife around for some reason.
I don't know why it was in my pocket.
I don't know who first put it there.
I just felt that I had to end it here, with this knife.

name: Tomosane
message: "It won't hurt. I'll aim for the heart."

name: Tomosane
message: "Aren't we both tired of this painful game?"
"No! You can't!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?"
Someone's voice...
I recognized that voice. That voice was...

name: Hasaki
message: "Y-You can't... Tomo Nii-san, you can't do that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Why did you follow me?"

name: Kimura
message: "Ahahaha... Sorry about that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Damn it, Kimura..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Crap. I forgot to lock the door. If I had locked it, you wouldn't have been able to follow me up here."

name: Hasaki
message: "You can't... Tomo Nii-san, I-I won't let you do that!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki..."
From her perspective, it must have looked like I was pointing a knife at my own chest.
In reality, I was about to plunge this knife into my own chest.

name: Hasaki
message: "If that's what you were planning to do... I should've just tied you up and never let you leave."

name: Tomosane
message: "I told you, that was also an option."

name: Takuji
message: "Yuuki!"
Hasaki couldn't see the change that just happened.
The knife moved from my hand to Mamiya Takuji's.
Mamiya Takuji's willpower grabbed hold of the knife.
Damn it...
It was his knife all along.
The moment I realized that...

name: Takuji
message: "Your heart is right here. It's right here, isn't it?"

name: Hasaki
message: "NOOOOOO!"

name: Hasaki
message: "No, Tomo Nii-san! NOOOOO!"

name: Tomosane
message: "At the very end, I still messed up, huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Messed up? What are you talking about? This was inevitable. This is pre-established harmony."
The knife had definitely carved its way deep into our physical body. In other words, both Mamiya Takuji and I had been stabbed.
Just from the feeling of that knife, I could tell that neither of us were safe.
I could tell the knife had been driven very deep into the flesh.

name: Tomosane
message: "Pre-established... harmony, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I see. So in your eyes, I've already outlived my purpose."

name: Takuji
message: "Yeah, that's right. You were just a hurdle for me on my path to becoming the savior."

name: Takuji
message: "An existence for me to surpass... It's true, I underestimated you. I underestimated you too much. I have to thank you for teaching me that."

name: Takuji
message: "The savior should never let his guard down. No matter how insignificant his opponent seems, he should never let his guard down."

name: Takuji
message: "You've taught me that... Thank you."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hey, Hasaki... I'm sorry..."

name: Tomosane
message: "It looks like I won't be able to keep my promise. This is the end for me."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... I couldn't do anything for you, Hasaki... could I..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Hasaki
message: "That's not true... That's not true... Tomo Nii-san, don't go..."

name: Tomosane
message: "There's nothing I can do... I've been beaten..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Nothing I can do... huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Is this too reality?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Then I can only accept it..."

name: Takuji
message: "Yes, accept it. This is reality."

name: Takuji
message: "I am the savior, and I will return the world to the sky. That is the reality."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see... Good job, then..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa... If this is how it was going to end, I shouldn't have used the last of my time like this..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I should've spent my time with you..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hahahaha... I've been an awful brother too..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I haven't changed at all..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Now then... Farewell, Mamiya Takuji. Congratulations. You've won."

name: Tomosane
message: "And I've lost..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Tomo Nii-san... Don't go."

name: Tomosane
message: "You dummy... Don't come near me. It's dangerous."

name: Tomosane
message: "This body will be Mamiya Takuji's soon. I'm going to disappear."

name: Hasaki
message: "You can't disappear, Tomo Nii-san! Please!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... I don't really want to disappear."

name: Tomosane
message: "I wanted to be with you longer."

name: Hasaki
message: "Then please, don't go! Let's go home. Let's go home together. Let's just go home..."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're right... That was the promise."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, it was..."

name: Tomosane
message: "To be together forever... and talk as much as we wanted..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, you promised we could talk as much as we wanted... I still want to talk to you, Tomo Nii-san..."

name: Tomosane
message: "We didn't talk enough, did we?"
I wish I could've talked with Hasaki more.
I was only paying attention to meaningless stuff. I couldn't see the most important thing in my life.
Because I would be disappearing, because I was fated to disappear, I tried not to make any memories with Hasaki.
Now that I think back on it, that was a really foolish thing to do.
All people eventually disappear. I'm not the only one fated to disappear.
Just because we're all going to disappear doesn't mean our memories aren't still precious.
So...

name: Tomosane
message: "Let's... talk."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, I-I... Last night, I saw a big sunflower."

name: Hasaki
message: "A big sunflower, yellow and beautiful in the sky..."

name: Tomosane
message: "A sunflower..."
For some reason, I saw a great sunflower stretching into the night sky.
For just a second...
That sunflower...
Sometime, somewhere before...

name: Hasaki
message: "It's already summer, you know? It's the middle of the summer..."

name: Hasaki
message: "Summer break is coming soon. I wish I could've gone somewhere with you this year, Tomo Nii-san."

name: Tomosane
message: "Summer, huh?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah. You said you wouldn't ever leave me, so I wanted to go on vacation somewhere this summer."

name: Hasaki
message: "Because this summer, it seemed like we were getting along again."

name: Hasaki
message: "This summer break... let's go back to our old town, together."

name: Tomosane
message: "Our town?"

name: Hasaki
message: "That's right. Our town. Where you and I were together before."

name: Tomosane
message: "That..."
That sunflower...
With Hasaki...
That's right...
Because I'm her big brother...
I should've done more things like that with her.
Huh?
Just now...
That landscape...
Oh, right. That landscape...
I knew it once.
A sunflower along the path...

name: Tomosane
message: "How did I forgot that? We were there together before."

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, so this summer... let's go back."

name: Tomosane
message: "This... summer?"

name: Hasaki
message: "Yeah, Tomo Nii-san!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, of course."

name: Tomosane
message: "This... summer?"
The blue sky and the sunflower.
With marshmallow clouds drifting by overhead.
And Hasaki wearing a big hat.
And she walks with me.
Forever and forever.
The two of us.
On that path.
To reach the top of the hill.
And there, waiting for us on the other side of the hill...
is a beautiful scene in the future.
